name: Docker Hub
description: Search and browse Docker Hub repositories, tags, and images via the Docker Hub REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Docker Hub REST API

Connect to Docker Hub to search repositories, browse tags, list builds, and manage Docker images programmatically.

### Features
- Search public Docker Hub repositories
- Browse repository tags and image details
- List repositories by namespace
- View build history
- Authenticate to access private repositories

### Authentication
Requires a Docker Hub personal access token or password. Use the Get Token tool to retrieve a JWT for subsequent requests.

Authorization.description: Docker Hub JWT token obtained from login (Environment variable: DOCKER_HUB_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Repository
tools.description: Get details about a specific Docker Hub repository.

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

response.description: Repository details including description, star count, pull count, and last updated timestamp.

tools.name: List Repository Tags
tools.description: List tags for a specific Docker Hub repository.

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: Paginated list of tags with name, digest, size, and last pushed timestamp.

tools.name: Get Tag
tools.description: Get details about a specific tag in a Docker Hub repository.

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

response.description: Tag details including name, digest, compressed size, and image architecture.

tools.name: Search Repositories
tools.description: Search Docker Hub for public repositories.

query.description: The search query string to find repositories.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: Search results with count and list of matching repositories including name, description, and pull count.

tools.name: List User Repositories
tools.description: List Docker Hub repositories for a specific namespace (user or organization).

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: Paginated list of repositories in the namespace with name, description, and pull count.

tools.name: Get Namespace
tools.description: Get details about a Docker Hub namespace (user or organization).

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

response.description: Namespace details including name, type, and repository count.

tools.name: List Organizations
tools.description: List Docker Hub organizations accessible to the authenticated user.

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: Paginated list of organizations the authenticated user belongs to.

tools.name: Get Repository Dockerfile
tools.description: Get the Dockerfile associated with a Docker Hub repository.

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

response.description: The Dockerfile content for the repository.

tools.name: List Builds
tools.description: List build history for a Docker Hub repository.

namespace.description: The Docker Hub namespace (username or organization name).

page.description: Page number of results to return.

response.description: Paginated list of build history entries with status, tags, and timestamps.

tools.name: Get Token
tools.description: Authenticate with Docker Hub and retrieve a JWT access token for subsequent API calls.

password.description: Your Docker Hub password or personal access token.

response.description: Authentication response containing the JWT token to use in Authorization header for subsequent requests.
